name: Eroad Limited
analysis: ERD's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 68% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.8450, stop A$0.7920, target A$1.1450 (5.66:1) — then trail it.
